data.title: Big Chicken, founded by Shaquille O'Neal, introduces new monthly dips to enhance flavor experience.
data.description: In recent news, Shaquille O'Neal's renowned chicken brand, Big Chicken, has introduced monthly new dips that boast bold flavors. The NBA legend's chicken concept is known for its unapologetically flavorful offerings. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on January 16, 2026. This move marks a fresh beginning for Big Chicken, showcasing a commitment to delivering exciting and indulgent dips regularly. The brand's dedication to providing unique and delicious options is evident in this approach, aiming to captivate customers with its ever-evolving menu. Stay tuned for the latest in Big Chicken's flavorful journey!

data.title: John Travolta, Morgan Freeman, and Kenny G to headline 23rd Annual Living Legends of Aviation Awards in Beverly Hills on Jan. 16, 2026. Hollywood's biggest night in aviation.
data.description: The prestigious Living Legends of Aviation® Red Carpet event will be held at the Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills, California on January 16, 2026. This will mark the 23rd Annual Living Legends of Aviation® Awards ceremony, bringing together Hollywood celebrities and pioneers in the aerospace industry. The event will showcase the achievements of notable individuals in aviation and honor their contributions to the field. The glamorous affair is set to highlight the intersection of entertainment and aerospace excellence, serving as a platform to celebrate innovation and talent.

data.title: SSP International, Inc. appoints Amy Hee Kim as Chief Program Officer, guiding the company's evolution. Del., Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: Envision Consulting has successfully recruited a forward-thinking individual to lead SSP International. The appointment of Amy Hee Kim as the new Chief Program Officer at SSP International, Inc. was officially announced on January 16, 2026, in Wilmington, Del. As Kim steps into this role, she will be responsible for overseeing the progress and growth of the company moving forward.

data.title: Vilkyškių pieninė AB acquired 100% shares of Marijampolės pieno konservai UAB, completing the transaction on 16 Jan 2026.
data.description: Vilkyškių pieninė AB successfully acquired 100% of the shares of Marijampolės pieno konservai UAB, effectively gaining sole control of the company. The acquisition was approved by the Competition Council of the Republic of Lithuania on 13 November 2025. The Share Purchase and Sale Agreement, finalized on 16 January 2026, outlined all conditions necessary for the transaction to proceed. Vilkyškių pieninė AB has now completed the acquisition of Marijampolės pieno konservai UAB, solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Tax refund may be confiscated if defaulted on student loans. Millions face risk of seizure by government for debt repayment.
data.description: Numerous individuals face the possibility of having their tax refunds taken by the government to cover outstanding student loan debts. The figure of individuals affected by this measure is in the millions, creating a significant impact on taxpayers dealing with student loan repayment.

data.title: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin strategy has hit a snag as his software company faces challenges amidst the crypto craze.
data.description: Michael Saylor's financial wizardry transformed Strategy, a typical software company, into a major player in the cryptocurrency craze. The strategy was a remarkable success, until recently.

data.title: Flowco launches "Built for the Journey" campaign, marking a defining moment post merger and IPO, one year after public debut.
data.description: Flowco, a leading energy production optimization and natural gas solutions provider based in Houston, revealed their inaugural unified brand campaign, Built for the Journey, to commemorate the one-year anniversary of their merger and IPO. The campaign signifies a significant milestone in the company's growth as a comprehensive partner in the energy sector. Flowco was established in 2024 following the consolidation of Estis Compression, Flowco Production Solutions (FPS), and Flogistix. This campaign launch showcases Flowco's commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry.

data.title: Walmart appoints new leaders to boost innovation and retail growth under new CEO John Furner.
data.description: In Bentonville, Arkansas, retail giant Walmart Inc. (Nasdaq: WMT) revealed new additions to its Executive Council, with incoming President and CEO John Furner leading the charge. The company aims to boost innovation and navigate the evolving retail landscape with these changes. Furner stressed the importance of Walmart's workforce as a key competitive edge, highlighting the internal promotions as a testament to the company's culture of fostering growth opportunities. With Furner at the helm, Walmart is gearing up for a transformative journey into the future of retail.
CHINA'S COMMERCE MINISTER SAYS CHINA, CANADA AGREED TO PROPERLY RESOLVE ECONOMIC AND TRADE CONCERNS - STATEMENT

data.title: McAfee partners with Pat McAfee to promote online safety to sports fans. Collaboration aims to reach engaged audience.
data.description: In San Jose, California, McAfee, a prominent online security company, revealed a fresh partnership with renowned sports figure Pat McAfee. The aim is to promote McAfee’s enhanced protection services to the highly enthusiastic fan base of sports and entertainment through Pat’s engaging personality and humor. The collaborative campaign, which commenced today, aims to simplify safety and security by leveraging Pat’s energetic voice. The initial video in the series capitalizes on Pat's charisma to connect with the audience.

data.title: Jailhouse Studios planned in Chattanooga as world's first quantum-ready data/AI center, creator campus.
data.description: A collaboration between real estate, technology, and entertainment industry experts has resulted in the establishment of Jailhouse Studios in Chattanooga, Tennessee. The former downtown jail in Hamilton County is set to become the world's premier quantum-ready sovereign data, processing, and AI center and creator campus. This innovative venture will combine advanced technology with creative production to offer groundbreaking services. With years of exploration behind it, Jailhouse Studios is poised to be a pioneer in the industry.

data.title: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) acquires Astro Technology, creators of Astro web framework, in push for high-performance web development.
data.description: Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) revealed the integration of The Astro Technology Company team, makers of the Astro web framework, into their company.

data.title: North American utilities utilizing AI for grid modernization per ISG, becoming customer-centric.
data.description: In North America, utilities are embracing AI-powered and data-focused technologies to enhance grid systems and improve customer service, according to ISG. The implementation of these advanced tools is on the rise, with an increasing number of companies incorporating AI solutions to boost efficiency and responsiveness. This shift towards modernization highlights the industry's commitment to innovation, with significant investments being made to upgrade infrastructure and streamline operations for better service delivery.

data.title: CR Fitness Holdings, a top Crunch Fitness franchise, surpasses 1 million members, contributing to Crunch Fitness' 3 million worldwide.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on January 16, 2026, CR Fitness Holdings, a top franchise group of Crunch Fitness, revealed that they have exceeded 1 million members across the country. This milestone adds to Crunch Fitness' total of over 3 million members globally.

data.title: Gentex Corporation introduces Ops-Core NOMAD System for night vision systems, geared in providing stability for users.
data.description: Gentex Corporation, a renowned company in personal protection solutions, unveiled the Ops-Core NOMAD System in Carbondale, Pennsylvania. This innovative system is designed to securely mount night vision and visual augmentation systems for defense forces, emergency responders, and industrial personnel without requiring a traditional ballistic or bump helmet. The Ops-Core NOMAD System provides stability and a low-profile design for optimal performance. This launch signifies Gentex Corporation's commitment to enhancing situational awareness.

data.title: Tom Lee invests $200M in Mr. Beast, morning news update.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest in the past 50 years, with a total of 164,000 jobs added in the month of July. This decrease in unemployment was largely driven by gains in professional and technical services, healthcare, social assistance, and financial activities sectors. Additionally, the average hourly earnings rose by 0.3% in July, making it a 3.2% increase over the past year. The current labor force participation rate stands at 63.0%, indicating a slight decline. Overall, the job market in the US shows positive growth and stability.
